app_description.message: Find busy sites in your open tabs and turn them into Chrome tab groups.

app_intro.message: Find the sites you have open, drag them into groups, then let Chrome tidy the tabs.

scan_button_help.message: Refresh the list of sites from your open tabs.

scan_threshold_help.message: Only show sites that have this many open tabs or more.

close_duplicates_help.message: Keep one copy of the same page and close the extra copies before organizing.

split_large_groups_help.message: The drag area still shows your setup as one group. Preview Changes and Organize My Tabs will split any group that is over the limit.

large_group_size_help.message: The most tabs to put in one Chrome group when splitting is on.

collapse_groups_help.message: Create the groups folded closed so the tab bar is cleaner.

found_sites_help.message: Drag a site into a group. Drag it back here to take it out.

custom_groups_help.message: Use Auto Build Groups for quick cleanup, or add your own groups and drag sites into them.

add_group_button_help.message: Create an empty group you can name and fill.

preview_button_help.message: Check what will move or close before changing your tabs.

group_button_help.message: Create the Chrome tab groups you set up above.

undo_button_help.message: Ungroup tabs moved last time. Pages that were closed as duplicates cannot be reopened here.

no_sites_found.message: No sites match this number yet.

all_sites_assigned.message: All shown sites are already in a group.

scan_found.message: Found $COUNT$ sites with $THRESHOLD$ or more tabs. Drag the ones you want into groups.

preview_status.message: Preview: $GROUPS$ groups, $TABS$ tabs, $DUPLICATES$ duplicate tabs to close.

done_status.message: Done: made $GROUPS$ groups, moved $TABS$ tabs, closed $DUPLICATES$ duplicates.

undo_status.message: Undid the last run for $COUNT$ tabs. Closed duplicate tabs cannot be reopened here.

undo_failed.message: Could not undo the last run: $ERROR$

auto_groups_button_help.message: Create one group for each scanned site. You can still rename groups or drag sites around before organizing.

auto_groups_status.message: Built $COUNT$ groups automatically. You can organize now or adjust them first.

auto_groups_split_status.message: Built $COUNT$ groups automatically. $LARGE$ large site groups will be split during preview or organizing, up to $LIMIT$ tabs each.
